title: SHACOS 3pcs Artificial Flower Garland 3 Strand 6.0 m Long Fake Rose Garland Flower Vines for Wedding Party Home Garden, Blue
features: Material: Flowers are made of silk, stem are made of plastic. Easy to mold according to your need. You can either bend them or cut them as needed. Compared with fresh flowers, they are reusable.
Rose Flower Garland Blue: 3 piece peony garlands per pack. Each vine has 8-peony blossoms, the diameter of the flower head is about 2.7 inches / 7 cm. Each garland is 200 cm long.

Easy to Care: Our flower wedding garlands do not require watering, but they keep spring fresh. Easy to clean and wipe off the dust. Artificial flower garland lasts long and does not wither, fade or damage.
Easy to Use: Flowers and leaves can be removed and installed. Easy to hanging on the wall, doors, swing, mirrors and anywhere as you like to enjoy with artificial peony garland.

Garland Decorations: These artificial rose garland will add a beautiful decor to any home, office or for special occasions like weddings, showers, party etc. DIY your house, add a touch of color and romance to your home with these beautiful Vine leaves.
description: Product Description SHACOS 3 Pcs Blue Artificial Peony Vine Silk Flower Garland Hanging Fake Peony Flowers Plants for Home Garden Hotel Wedding Party Decor, 600 cm Are you looking for wedding hanging vine flowers? Get beautiful for your big day like these artificial peony vine. Faux peony flowers can create a romantic look that makes for a wonderful wedding for you! 100% brand new and high quality Colour: Blue, White, Pink, Champagne Material: Silk flowers and leaves, plastic vines Size of vine: Each garland 200 cm/78.7 inch Long Size of flowers: Approx. 8 cm/3 inch Packing: 3 x Artificial Garland Vine Flowers Flower quantity: 24 head peony in total USE : Restaurants, shopping malls, bars, offices, home, garden, wedding, festivals, party decorations. Features Lifelike flowers Each garland has 8 heads flowers. Vivid color, exquisite petals, beautiful shape. Flowers and leaves can be removed and installed. Table centerpiece Elegant, pure and vibrant with real touch. Add a touch of color and romance to your home with these beautiful faux flowers. DIY Wreath Create a bouquet that fits perfectly into your personal decor. They're also perfect for floral arrangements, centerpieces, crafts, and more. SHACOS Artificial Flowers Garland Fake Peony Flower Hanging lvy Vine Garland Silk Peony Flowers Vines for Wedding Home Backdrop Wall Decor Decoration for Door Artificial Silk Garland Peony Vine,Close to nature ,widely use, durable and washable. Not fade and can be remained for long time. Decoration for Wedding Perfect for decorating wedding party, your home and garden decoration, office,coffee house,altar,church and so on. Decoration for Wall You can hang them together as a flower wall or use them separately for other decoration. Perfect for Home/ Indoor Decoration Artificial flowers well made and vibrantly colored looks realistic and beautiful. Perfect for Home, hotel, party,office decoration,decor,altar,church. Lifelike silk flower and leaves,will keep fresh look even after longtime use. Not Only Amazing Wedding Decor,But Also Good for all kinds of party decorations or Home Decor. Artificial silk flower garland peony vine, close to nature, widely use, durable and beautiful, won't fade over time. Anywhere indoor and outdoor as you like to enjoy with artificial leaves vine.
